title: LineItemReference

lineItemId.description:
This is the unique identifier of the eBay order line item that is part of the shipping fulfillment.

Line item Ids can be found in the lineItems.lineItemId field of the getOrders response.

quantity.description: This is the number of lineItems associated with the trackingNumber specified by the seller. This must be a whole number greater than zero (0).

description: This type identifies the line item and quantity of that line item that comprises one fulfillment, such as a shipping package.
